title: libpod: demote graph driver DB override from Errorf to Debugf
body:
The `mergeDBConfig` function corrects runtime config values to match those stored in the database. Every sibling override in this function already uses `Debugf`: run root, graph root, static dir, tmp dir, and volume path. Only the graph driver override was logged at `Errorf`, despite having identical semantics (the DB value unconditionally wins).

A config mismatch alone is not an error condition — it simply means the user's config or compiled-in default differs from the DB-stored driver. The DB is the authoritative source; the override is intentional.

This change is consistent with the existing `Debugf` pattern used for all other `mergeDBConfig` overrides on lines 1106, 1115, 1132, 1139, and 1146 of `libpod/runtime.go`.
